programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.title: Filmed in Gaza
programme.desc: Two journalists document life in Gaza during the Israel-Hamas war and ultimately find themselves trapped and facing growing dangers as the conflict intensified. For 22 months, producer Samed Abu Zarifa and video journalist Samir Al Boji reported for NBC News from one of the most inaccessible and dangerous places in the world. As the network's on-the-ground journalists - after Israel barred foreign media from entering the region unless escorted by the military - Samed and Samir's daily reports and video appeared on NBC News' many platforms, newscasts and social media accounts, reaching millions of people. But until now, their identities have remained unheralded for their safety.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: Santa Baby 2: Christmas Maybe
programme.desc: Santa is in a late-life crisis – he's tired of his responsibilities and is ready to pass on the reins to Mary, his business-minded daughter, who feels torn between the family business and running her own firm in New York City. The situation intensifies when Teri, an ambitious new arrival to the North Pole, sows dissension at the workshop.

programme.title: Thomas Kinkade's Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: Barely out of school and still searching for his voice as an artist, twenty-year-old Thom looks forward to another idyllic holiday in his hometown of Placerville, CA, a rustic hamlet nestled in the Sierra foothills. But this Christmas, Placerville is struggling: the town's tourist industry is failing, Thom's ailing, once-brilliant mentor, Glen, has lost his ability to paint, and Thom's spirited mother, MaryAnne, reveals that she's losing their family home to foreclosure. Faced with so much uncertainty, Thom comes to realize that salvation may lie in the community of friends and loved ones he left behind. With Glen's help, he not only discovers himself as an artist, but helps the entire town of Placerville rediscover the true spirit of the holidays.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street (1994)
programme.desc: Six-year-old Susan has doubts about childhood's most enduring miracle: Santa Claus. Then Susan meets Kriss Kringle, a department store Santa who believes he's the genuine article.

programme.desc: Opposites don't just attract - they hilariously feud and collide when SANDRA BULLOCK plays an activist lawyer and HUGH GRANT is the eccentric tycoon who hires her…….

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street (1994)
programme.desc: Six-year-old Susan has doubts about childhood's most enduring miracle: Santa Claus. Then Susan meets Kriss Kringle, a department store Santa who believes he's the genuine article.

programme.desc: Daphne (Amanda Bynes), a spirited young American girl, travels to London in search of her long-lost father (Colin Firth), an influential aristoc ratic politician.

programme.desc: Detective Sergeant Tom Brant (Jason Statham, "Crank") is assigned to track down a dangerous serial killer that has been picking off police officers. With his partner, Porter Nash, this killer cop must track down the cop killer.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: Frank Martin has been pressured into transporting Valentina, the kidnapped daughter of Leonid Vasilev, the head of the Environmental Protection Agency for the Ukraine, from Marseilles through Stuttgart and Budapest until he ends up in Odessa on the Black Sea. Along the way, with the help of Inspector Tarconi, Frank has to contend with the people who strong armed him to take the job, agents sent by Vasilev to intercept him, and the general non-cooperation of his passenger. Despite Valentina's cynical disposition and his resistance to get involved, Frank and Valentina fall for each other, while escaping from one life- threatening situation after another.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: Liam Neeson stars as a man who gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home and works against the clock to stop a deadly attack to save the lives of his fellow train passengers.

programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Detective Sergeant Tom Brant (Jason Statham, "Crank") is assigned to track down a dangerous serial killer that has been picking off police officers. With his partner, Porter Nash, this killer cop must track down the cop killer.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: Liam Neeson stars as a man who gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home and works against the clock to stop a deadly attack to save the lives of his fellow train passengers.

programme.title: Love On Retreat
programme.desc: When beauty brand Bloom decides to focus on online sales, Jenny must find a way to "live" in "work-life balance" while Nate has already figured it out. When sparks fly between them, there's only one problem - that's his boss's brother.

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Marley Corbett (Kate Hudson) is young, beautiful, and wildly funny, but she's afraid of opening herself up to true love and commitment. Though she uses her humor to prevent matters from getting serious, a life-changing visit to her doctor (Gael Garcia Bernal) sends both of them on an eye-opening adventure of mutual discovery, leading to revelations neither thought possible. Also stars Peter Dinklage, Whoopi Goldberg, Kathy Bates and Rosemarie DeWitt.

programme.title: The Sound of Music
programme.desc: Rodgers and Hammerstein's musical inspired this story of the governess who won the heart of the Von Trapp family and whose courage led them across the Alps in their 1938 flight to freedom.

programme.title: The Wishing Tree

programme.title: Ancient Recipes with Sohla
programme.desc: Ancient Recipes with Sohla Sohla El-Waylly uncovers the true story of the first Thanksgiving.

programme.desc: A busy ad executive who is about to become a partner in her firm.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Fallen Hearts

programme.title: VC Andrews' Gates of Paradise
programme.desc: Heaven's daughter, Annie, orphaned, crippled, and longing for her lost family.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: A beautiful woman (Marie Avgeropoulos) helps a New York bicycle messenger (Taylor Lautner) who's in hot water with a group of gangsters.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Using his love for comics as inspiration, teenager Dave Lizewski (Aaron Johnson) decides to reinvent himself as a superhero -- despite a complete lack of special powers. Dave dons a costume, dubs himself "Kick-Ass," and gets to work fighting crime. He joins forces with the father/daughter vigilante team of Big Daddy and Hit Girl, then befriends another fledgling crime-fighter called Red Mist (Christopher Mintz-Plasse), but a scheming mobster soon puts their alliance to the test.

programme.title: Gamer
programme.desc: Each week Kable (Gerard Butler), a death-row inmate, battles his fellow prisoners in a violent online game called "Slayers," his every move controlled by a young gamer's remote device. To the players, Kable and the other inmates are just simulated characters. But, to a resistance group that opposes the game's inventor, Kable is a critical component of their plan to end the inventor's form of high-tech slavery.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay comes the best 'Transformers' ever! With humanity facing extinction from a terrifying new threat, it's up to the Autobots to save Earth. They'll need new allies, including inventor Cade (Mark Wahlberg) and the Dinobots!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: In 1987, Jordan Belfort takes an entry-level job at a Wall Street brokerage firm. By the early 1990s, while still in his 20s, Belfort founds his own firm, Stratton Oakmont. Together with his trusted lieutenant and a merry band of brokers, Belfort makes a huge fortune by defrauding wealthy investors out of millions. However, while Belfort and his cronies partake in a hedonistic brew of sex, drugs and thrills, the SEC and the FBI close in on his empire of excess.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Billionaire and aviation tycoon Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a successful public figure: a director of big-budget Hollywood films such as "Hell's Angels," a passionate lover of Hollywood leading ladies Katharine Hepburn (Cate Blanchett) and Ava Gardner (Kate Beckinsale), and an aviation pioneer who helps build TWA into a major airline. But in private, Hughes remains tormented, suffering from paralyzing phobias and depression. The higher he rises, the farther has to fall.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: The implausible escape of a brilliant murderess brings U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels (Leonardo DiCaprio) and his new partner (Mark Ruffalo) to Ashecliffe Hospital, a fortress-like insane asylum located on a remote, windswept island. The woman appears to have vanished from a locked room, and there are hints of terrible deeds committed within the hospital walls. As the investigation deepens, Teddy realizes he will have to confront his own dark fears if he hopes to make it off the island alive.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: On the run from a bank robbery that left several police officers dead, Seth Gecko (George Clooney) and his paranoid, loose-cannon brother, Richard (Quentin Tarantino), hightail it to the Mexican border. Kidnapping preacher Jacob Fuller (Harvey Keitel) and his kids, the criminals sneak across the border in the family's RV and hole up in a topless bar. Unfortunately, the bar also happens to be home base for a gang of vampires, and the brothers and their hostages have to fight their way out.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four reluctant heroes form an unlikely alliance in order to rescue the town of Silverado from a nasty sheriff.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: Four young friends find the remains of a missing teenager. Based on the book "The Body" by Stephen King.

programme.title: Radio Flyer
programme.desc: Two young brothers childhood world is turned upside down when their stepfather enters their lives.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship in the Army
programme.desc: Lt. Rip Crandall (Jack Lemmon) is entrusted with one of the most important missions of his World War II career: to shuttle an Australian spy (Chips Rafferty) into enemy territory. Unfortunately, he'll be doing it with one of the Navy's least seaworthy vessels, the USS Echo. But even in a clunker of a ship, Crandall and his madcap crew -- including his enthusiastic young ensign (Ricky Nelson) -- do their best to make their ill-equipped mission a success.

programme.title: Only Angels Have Wings
programme.desc: Rough and tough Geoff Carter (Cary Grant) runs a tiny airline that cannot afford to miss any flights, despite the dangers along many of the routes. When Bonnie Lee (Jean Arthur), a performer who is falling for him, sees that Geoff is preparing to fly in violent weather conditions, she takes measures to make him stay. She's successful in her attempt, and two of his employees are forced to make the flight for him -- but Bonnie may have been correct about the potential peril of that flight.

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: When hard-charging New York newspaper editor Walter Burns discovers that his ex-wife, investigative reporter Hildy Johnson, has gotten engaged to milquetoast insurance agent Bruce Baldwin, he unsuccessfully tries to lure her away from tame domestic life with a story about the impending execution of convicted murderer Earl Williams. But when Hildy discovers Williams may be innocent, her reporter instincts take over.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Adaptation of the Pierre Bouelle novel about POWs in Burma forced to build a bridge to aid the war effort of their Japanese captors. British and American officers plot to blow up the structure, but the commander of the bridge's construction has different plans.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The wife of a professor investigates the murder of a beautiful college student who has been appearing to her.

programme.title: The Haunting
programme.desc: In this edge-of-your-seat supernatural thriller featuring Hollywood's hottest stars, a study in fear escalates into a heart-stopping nightmare for a professor and three subjects trapped in a mysterious mansion.

programme.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
programme.desc: Nell is back in the safety of civilization and sent to live in a group home where she's encouraged to leave her past behind and start a new life. Just as Nell settles in, she is tormented by the seductive demonic presence that once possessed her.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The wife of a professor investigates the murder of a beautiful college student who has been appearing to her.

programme.title: Stealing Christmas
programme.desc: A burglar (Tony Danza) lands a job playing Santa Claus as he plots to rob a small-town bank on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Same Time, Next Year
programme.desc: In 1951, at a small California inn, George (Alan Alda) and Doris (Ellen Burstyn) have an affair. Instead of writing it off as a one-night stand, the pair decide to meet at the inn every year for a romantic retreat, away from their respective spouses and families. In the decades that follow, both George and Doris face their own personal struggles and hardships, and together they develop a level of love and intimacy that exceeds the ones found in their own marriages.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Katie (Michelle Pfeiffer) and her husband, Ben (Bruce Willis), have grown apart. While they keep up the facade of having a contented marriage, mostly to not worry their children, they aren't happy together and argue frequently. While the kids are away at camp, Katie and Ben decide to separate and try to reassess their relationship to see if they should stay together or split up for good. Can they find enough that's positive in their marriage to keep it going?

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date

programme.title: A Frozen Christmas 2

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless for Christmas

programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to steal it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to town under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Young Billy Young
programme.desc: Fleeing the scene of a gruesome gunfight in Mexico, Billy Young (Robert Walker) arrives in the small town of Lordsburg, where he is promptly deputized by local sheriff Ben Kane (Robert Mitchum). Kane takes the troubled young man under his wing, hoping to reform his lawless ways. As the bond between the two men grows stronger, Kane recruits Young for a particularly personal assignment: to help bring to justice Frank Boone (John Anderson), a vicious outlaw responsible for the death of his son.

programme.title: Man With the Gun
programme.desc: Sheridan City is out of control. The citizens are corrupt, the saloon is an immoral indulgence, and gunmen and greedy opportunists come and go as they please. With the town's lawman (Henry Hull) incapable of maintaining order, the town council brings in a hired gun, Clint Tollinger (Robert Mitchum), who has business of his own with the saloon madame (Jan Sterling). Tollinger sets about proving his reputation as a "town tamer" through his signature approach: eradicating violence with violence.

programme.title: Outlaw Justice

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two prospectors make a cruel joke: they offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie Filene.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A prospector strikes it rich and decides to marry the girl he left behind, unaware that she's stopped waiting.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Miners become hostile when they suspect an assayer cheated them with deceptive evaluations.

Seryeong goes to prison to tell him who she is and save him when her father appears.

programme.title: The Princess Man Ep.5

Kim Jongseo makes a deal with Prince Suyang to resign from his position in return for sparing his son's life. Seungyu leaves, but returns quickly when Munjong collapses at the princess's wedding.

programme.title: The Princess Man Ep.6

programme.title: The Princess Man Ep.7
programme.desc: Seungyu goes to see Seryeong. He confesses his feelings. Seryeong tries to tell him who she is, but misses the chance. Kim Jongseo pressures Suyang's people to protect Danjong. While planning a way to restore his power, Suyang finds out that Seryeong is seeing Seungyu again.

programme.title: The Princess Man Ep.8
programme.desc: Seryeong finds out about Prince Suyang's plan and sneaks out to warn Seungyu of the danger. But, she is captured by the servants before she gets a chance to tell him. Prince Suyang heads to Kim Jongseo's house to kill him. Because of a message sent by Seryeong, Seungyu leaves the house before Suyang arrives.

programme.title: The Princess Man Ep.9
programme.desc: Seungyu rushes to Princess Gyeonghye's house to tell the king that his father is alive, but he is captured by Myeon. Suyang lets him go, so he will lead them to his father. Seryeong hears Seungyu was captured and rushes to the princess's house, but the princess tells her Seungyu is dead. The men who follow Seungyu kill Kim Jongseo and Myeon is about to bury Seungyu.

programme.title: 18 Holes: Swamill Creek
programme.desc: PGA pro Jimmy Hanlin and former LPGA player Danah Bordner visit the newly renovated Sawmill Creek Resort in Sandusky, Ohio. The duo takes viewers through the Tom Fazio–designed course hole by hole, highlighting its generous fairways, scenic par threes, and strategic challenges like marsh carries and doglegs. Along the way, they mix in lighthearted competition, course tips, and local flavor—emphasizing the resort's updates, proximity to Cedar Point, and inviting atmosphere for golfers of all levels. The show blends golf instruction, friendly banter, and a showcase of the resort's amenities, making it both entertaining and informative.

programme.title: The Swing Clinic: Feather Sound 1 of 2
programme.desc: In this episode of The Swing Clinic, PGA pro Jimmy Hanlin and golf influencer Claire Hogle visit Feather Sound Country Club near St. Pete–Clearwater, Florida, for a mix of golf instruction and local flavor. They cover key swing tips like proper weight transfer, preventing early extension, and fixing common driver issues like slicing. Claire also demonstrates drills to help older golfers gain more distance through increased hip rotation and flexibility.

The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 2
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 3

Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: About Time: Helen and Brittany Hunt Elk in Montana
programme.desc: Brittany and Helen have put more work in on MeatEater than just about anyone else, but have yet to hunt a big game animal. Steven Rinella takes them through the process from beginning to end. They need to get their hunters safety, learn to shoot, train for the woods, and get geared up. When November comes they're ready to go, and they strike out into the mountains of northern Montana for the adventure of their lives.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas to hunt Sandhill cranes. The Sandhill crane offers a unique wingshooting opportunity and also carries the nickname "rib eye of the sky" because of its supposed similarities to a handsome cut of beef. ¬†It's fast action and plenty of laughs as Steve, Ronny, and Ed explore the culinary delights of these birds with a Texas style "Crane Cookout."

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.desc: It's May of 2022 and Mark Peterson is waterfowl hunting in Argentina. A year has passed since Mark conquered the North America Waterfowl Slam. programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ

programme.title: Scott Losse
programme.desc: Scott Losse is a stand-up comedian from Seattle, Washington. He is married and has two chihuahuas. Scott has performed at Portland's Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Sketchfest Seattle, Bumbershoot: Seattle's Music & Arts Festival, Treefort Music Fest and lots of places that aren't festivals. Comedy Clubs. Colleges. Bars. Elks Lodges. He was the winner of the 2013 Northwest Comedy Competition and a Semi-Finalist in the Seattle International Comedy Competition. Scott can be seen on the latest season of Laughs TV on FOX.

programme.title: Tom Ryan
programme.desc: Over the years Tom Ryan has worked steadily at comedy clubs, concert venues, corporate functions and colleges across the U.S.. He has also made national television appearances on Showtime, A&E Comedy Central, and… Three times on “The Late Show with David Letterman!”. He has performed as the opening act in concert for: B.B. King, Tim Allen, Steven Wright, Natalie Cole, and Dennis Miller just to name a few. He has contributed monologue jokes to the award winning "Politically Incorrect with Bill Maher" and regularly headlines corporate events for companies ranging from Coca-Cola to Church and Dwight. Tom believes that the best comedy comes from the most unlikely sources.

But slaying a vampire as powerful as Kagan will be no easy task.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

programme.title: A Haunting

programme.title: Silent Hill
programme.desc: Based on the best-selling horror action game, Silent Hill stars Radha Mitchell (Man on Fire) as Rose, a desperate mother who takes her adopted daughter, Sharon, to the town of Silent Hill in an attempt to cure her of her ailment. After a violent car crash, Sharon disappears and Rose begins her desperate search to get her back. She descends into a fog of smoldering ash and into the center of the twisted reality of a town's terrible secret. Pursued by grotesquely deformed creatures and a townspeople stuck in permanent purgatory, Rose begins to uncover the truth behind the apocalyptic disaster that burned the town 30 years back. Dare to step inside the horrific town of Silent Hill, where darkness preys on every soul and Hell's creations await around every corner. But know that once you enter...there is no turning back.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Baby Komodo Encounter – Are They Dangerous?!

programme.title: Giant Crocodile Found – Could You Outswim Him?

programme.title: Snapped by World's Fastest Jaws!
programme.desc: Mark demonstrates the power of nature's fastest jaws—those of the trap-jaw ant. The slow-motion footage is as impressive as the speed.What's a mud dauber wasp? A surprisingly painful stinger! Mark shows how this lesser-known species defends its nest.

programme.title: Don't Look Down! Canyoneering Is Intense!

programme.title: Stung by a Venomous Neon Caterpillar!

programme.title: $100 Coffee vs. 1¢ Coffee – Which Actually Tastes Better?
programme.desc: Is a $100 coffee really better than a $0.01 cup? Coyote hosts a wild taste test to find out if price truly equals flavor. BOOM! Coyote gets hit by a surprise blast during filming. He's okay—but the slow-motion replay says otherwise.

programme.title: Pink Creature from Down Under! (Rare Turtle Frog)

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Cloudy With a Chance of Hurricanes
programme.desc: MOTHER NATURE UNPREDICTABLE, POWERFUL AND MESMERIZING. ANYTHING CAN CHANGE IN A SPLIT SECOND. FROM HEAVY RAIN, TO HAIL THE SIZE OF BASEBALLS, GIANT TORNADOS, AND WILDFIRES ENCAPSULATING THOUSANDS OF ACRES OF LAND, THIS IS JUST ANOTHER DAY HERE ON EXTREME WEATHER COUNTDOWN.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
programme.desc: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade
programme.desc: Where can you float through a flood, battle a blizzard, and twist around in a tornado, all in the same day? Nowhere but here, on Extreme Weather Countdown. Buckle up, because we've got a wild ride in store for you today.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Whichever Way the Wind Blows
programme.desc: Today's countdown will give you a front row seat to some once in a lifetime weather phenomena from around the globe, so let's batten down the hatches and get right into it!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | There's a Storm A-Brewin'!
programme.desc: Welcome to a brand new episode of Extreme Weather Countdown. I hope you've got your snow boots, umbrellas, winter coats, and perhaps a bathing suit to change into because today we will be running the gamut of inclement weather events from all over the globe.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | When Lightning Strikes
programme.desc: You've arrived at the only place flash floods, thunderstorms, avalanches, and gale force winds will flash before your eyes one after the other. That's right, you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown, and we have an all-new lineup prepared today.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain Check
programme.desc: Here at Extreme Weather Countdown, no natural phenomenon is too crazy, and we've returned with an episode chock-full of footage from the eye of the storm. Settle in, because there are rough seas ahead.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn Signs: Around Town
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se molestan por el ruido que provocan los cohetes de una fiesta. Rocko se queja de que Alejandra no es cariñosa con él.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Frankie se entera de que un famoso director está interesado en uno de sus guiones. Los López Pérez reciben una orden de desalojo. Germán decide irse a Estados Unidos tras una decepción amorosa.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los López Pérez podrían regresar al edificio después de haberse ido a Angangueo tras su desalojo. Por otro lado, ¿quién será el misterioso galán de Silvita? Además, un vecino regresa después de una larga temporada ausente.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena es la nueva jefa de seguridad y, debido a los robos en el edificio, instala cámaras con la ayuda de Germán. Silvita y Luisito tienen su primera cita.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica le da un gran susto a Bibi, ella se desmaya y al despertar se vuelve agresiva y maleducada. Federica se pone muy feliz porque su hija ya es normal, la consiente y le perdona todo.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Un famoso productor de comerciales quiere contratar a Ludoviquito, Federica y Ludovico se pelean por ser el representante de su hijo para quedarse con el dinero que gane.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Don Camerino le da un ascenso a Ludovico y necesita estar bien descansado para cumplir sus nuevas obligaciones. Ludovico le pide a Federica que lo deje dormir. Al día siguiente, Ludovico se duerme en la oficina y no puede cumplir bien con su trabajo.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles: El sueño angélico
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía perdona a su papá. Marina le promete a Mía salir de sus adicciones. León es detenido acusado de malos manejos. Mía le ruega a Miguel que no se vaya a Monterrey porque lo ama. Diego le dice a Roberta que la ama.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco y Alma se casan, José les agradece aceptarla en su familia. Diego y Roberta se reconcilian. Miguel le pide a Mía que se case con él. Pascual clausura el curso. Roberta les dice a todos que RBD seguirá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia se queda sin vacaciones por hacer un striptease. Por su parte, Diego sufre un accidente por conducir ebrio. Roberta es obligada a estudiar en el Elite Way School.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta intenta no ser admitida en el colegio. Por su parte, Miguel deja Monterrey, y se le dificulta presentar su examen de admisión en el Elite Way School. Además, Lupita puede estudiar gracias a su tía.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mayra ayuda a Miguel a entrar a la escuela. Miguel, Lupita y Nico hacen su examen para entrar a la escuela. Por su parte, los chicos de cuarto año se van de viaje a Vallarta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta casi se ahoga y Mauro la salva. Diego va a una iglesia a hacer servicio comunitario y un tipo lo golpea.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta y Mia se pelean por el profesor. Pero la que termina ganando la pelea es Alma, la mamá de Roberta.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Amor compartido

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Santiago le dice a Ofelia que Ricardo engañó a Camila. Lisabeta recupera sus bienes y firma la custodia de Camila. Camila le promete a Santiago hacer que Ricardo se vaya del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Lisabeta y Francisca se van a casa de Camila. Chino le dice a Ricardo que todos saben que es pirata y que Camila está con Lisabeta.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Mario llega a pagar la deuda de Camila, pero le dicen que no la pueden liberar. Ricardo habla con Lisabeta y luego con Camila, y ambos prometen luchar por su amor.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Lisabeta le dice a Francisca que se irá con Ricardo. Comienza una batalla en la que Ricardo sale herido. Lisabeta piensa que Ricardo murió.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Ricardo se debate entre la vida y la muerte. Santiago logra que Jorge ayude a liberar a Camila a cambio de aceptar su nombre. Camila se da cuenta de que está embarazada.

programme.title: Esmeralda

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Esmeralda le reclama a Álvaro por haberla llevado a reencontrarse con José Armando y él le propone continuar en el hospital. Por una indiscreción de Graciela, Esmeralda se entera de que llevaron a su hijo a casa de los Peñarreal.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley, Nat Adderley, Yusuf Lateef & Joe Zawinul
programme.desc: Cannonball Adderley: Live in '63 boasts two beautifully filmed concerts from one of the most celebrated sextets in jazz history, captured at the top of their game. Cannonball Adderley (alto sax), Nat Adderley (cornet), and the masterful Yusef Lateef (tenor sax, flute, oboe), provide a massive three-horn frontline attack, while the stellar rhythm section featuring a pre-Weather Report Joe Zawinul (piano), Sam Jones (bass), and Louis Hayes (drums) fuel the songs with a deep infectious swing. Quincy Jones' "Jessica's Day" leaps from the gate with a huge big band sound that is extraordinary for only six musicians. This recording is a reminder that Cannonball Adderley was one of the most outstanding and highly respected alto saxophonists in the history of jazz. He was a bluesy jazzman who could play anything in superb fashion.

programme.title: Rahsaan Roland Kirk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: James Brown
programme.sub-title: James Brown - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1981, legendary American singer James Brown gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. The "Godfather of Soul", "Mr. Dynamite", and "Soul Brother No. 1" was a major force in 20th century popular music, influencing many musicians in numerous genres.

programme.title: Omer Avital
programme.sub-title: Omer Avital Qantar - Jazz in Duketown
programme.desc: Jazz in Duketown is the largest free outdoor jazz festival in the Netherlands. It's a real gathering for jazz addicts, inviting internationally renowned artists. Israeli-American double bassist Omer Avital plays radiantly energetic, resounding jazz with oriental influences. At Jazz in Duketown 2019, Avital forms a quintet with saxophonists Asaf Yuria and Alexander Levin, drummer Ofri Nehemya, and pianist Eden Ladin. They present singular repertoire from Avital's album 'Qantar'.

programme.title: Dhafer Youssef
programme.desc: Jazz à Vienne is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981, it has attracted a mix of jazz legends and exciting newcomers, with many of them playing return engagements. Each year welcomes outstanding international stars to the historical Le Théâtre Antique to impress and inspire their audiences. In 2018, Tunisian composer Dhafer Youssef alternated between his hypnotic voice and masterful oud playing at Jazz à Vienne. His stunning abilities have to be heard to be believed. He is joined by bassist Matt Brewer and drummer Aaron Parks.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist Chucho Valdés brought his band ‘Jazz Batá 2' to the Malta Jazz Festival on July 19, 2019. The air was thick with anticipation as Valdés took to the stage, revisiting the small-group concept of his mythical 1972 Cuban album ‘Jazz Batá'. The batá repertoire – the deep classical music of West Africa – permeates Valdés' piano solos throughout the concert. Valdés's band consists of Dreiser Durruthy (Batas and vocals), Yaroldy Abreu (percussions and vocals), Abraham Mansfarroll (percussion), Ramón Vazquez Martirena-Bajo (bass guitar). They delivered a performance that reverberated through the historic island.

programme.title: Fats Domino
programme.sub-title: Fats Domino - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. American singer and pianist Fats Domino gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival of 1980. Domino was one of the pioneers of rock and roll music, selling more than 65 million records and having 11 top hits between 1955 and 1960.

programme.title: Roberto Abbado, Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma & Eleonora Buratto
programme.desc: Roberto Abbado conducts the Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, the Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma, and four vocal soloists in an outstanding performance of Giuseppe Verdi's Messa da Requiem, recorded at the Parco Ducale di Parma, Italy as part of Festival Verdi 2020. The soloists are soprano Eleonora Buratto, mezzosoprano Anita Rachvelishvili, tenor Giorgio Berrugi, and bass Roberto Tagliavini. When his fellow composer Gioachino Rossini died in 1868, Verdi proposed to compose a ‘Messa per Rossini' in his honor, to be written by himself and several other Italian composers. Verdi wrote the concluding movement, ‘Libera me'. When the premiere was cancelled, the project lay dormant. When Italian poet Alessandro Manzoni passed away a few years later, Verdi revisited his plan to compose a requiem – this time in honor of the poet he so greatly admired. As an opera composer, Verdi knew better than anyone how to infuse the work with drama, as is evident in the revised version of his ‘Libera me'. The famous, powerful ‘Dies Irae' especially stands out, depicting the horrors of the Last Judgement.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Vadim Yarkov
programme.desc: This stunning performance of theatrical ice dancing brings viewers into the enchanting world of Tchaikovsky's magnificent holiday classic, The Nutcracker On Ice, performed by the internationally renowned Imperial Ice Stars, and including former champion figure skaters, Vadim Yarkov and Olga Sharutenko. This very special performance and soundtrack was performed by the Manchester Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Tim A. Duncan, and filmed live in Cape Town, South Africa in 2011.

programme.title: Mariss Jansons, Berliner Philharmoniker & Emmanuel Pahud
programme.desc: Joseph Haydn (1732-1809): Symphony No. 94 in G major "Surprise" - Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (1756-1791): Flute Concerto in D major, K. 314 - Hector Berlioz (1803-1869): Symphonie fantastique Op. 14. Emmanuel Pahud (flute), Berliner Philharmoniker conductor: Mariss Jansons. The European Concert has been a tradition of the Berliner Philharmoniker since 1991. The musicians commemorate the anniversary of the orchestra's founding on May 1st, 1882, playing in different European cities. This concert was recorded in the church "Hagia Eirene" in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester Leipzig, Andris Nelsons & Kristine Opolais
programme.desc: Andris Nelsons, together with his then-wife, the great soprano Kristine Opolais and the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig present a program dedicated to Antonin Dvořák, singing the melodies that the composer hid in all layers of his music with tender, warm, soft colors. Nelsons' tempos remain calm and relaxed, allowing the omnipresent beauty of Dvořák's music to unfold and flood the Gewandhaus. The program opens with Othello, a Concert Overture for Orchestra, Op. 93. Opolais performs “Song to the Moon” from Rusalka, “Songs my Mother Taught Me” from Gypsy Songs, Op. 55/4. This is followed by the Polonaise and 'O, marno, marno to je' from Rusalka and 'Dobrá! Já mu je dám!... Jak je mi?' from Smetana's opera Dalibor. The concert closes with a performance of Dvořák's Symphony no. 9 in E Minor, Op. 95 (“From the New World”). Recorded at the Gewandhaus, Leipzig in May 2017.

programme.title: Marvin Gaye
programme.desc: Marvin Gaye- Born in 1939, in Washington, D.C., Marvin Gaye sang in his father's church and in the Moonglows before signing with Motown. He recorded songs by Smokey Robinson before becoming his own producer on the protest album What's Going On (1971). Gaye was killed in 1984 during a domestic dispute with his father.

programme.title: Al Green
programme.desc: Al Green is known for the hit song "Let's Stay Together," and for leaving his musical career at its height in the 1970s to become a reverend at his own church.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: The Mamas and Papas
programme.desc: The Mamas and Papas were a four-piece folk act whose high harmonies and blend of easygoing, trippy originals with nicely stylized covers virtually soundtracked the late '60s. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Mamas and Papas.

programme.title: Crosby Stills Nash & Young
programme.desc: Rock's first supergroup, Crosby, Stills, Nash, and Young each had successful recording careers before coming together—Crosby with the Byrds, Stills and Young with Buffalo Springfield, and Nash with the Hollies—and each has been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame at least twice. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Crosby Stills Nash & Young.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Lynyrd Skynyrd
programme.desc: The quintessential Southern rock band, Lynyrd Skynyrd rose to prominence in 1973, full of regional pride and stressing cocky, boisterous hard rock as opposed to the Allman Brothers' more open-ended blues. Their signature song, "Freebird," complete with it fiery five-minute, three-guitar solo, is easily the most requested live song in existence. When the band broke up in 1977, after Ronnie Van Zant, Steve Gaines and Cassie Gaines died in a plane crash, rock suffered a tremendous loss.

programme.title: Johnny Cash
programme.desc: A documentary that sweeps you along with the flow of musical genius that is Johnny Cash. From his family's poverty in the Great Depression to touring with Elvis and becoming a legend in his own right. We see his reinvention for a whole new generation with Rick Rubin and how ‘Hurt' became the epitaph to his amazing life and career.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: Birmingham in the late 1960s was an industrial city, packed with music groups. At its height, the New Musical Express had reported 500 on its bustling circuit and from two of these groups, Black Sabbath was formed. The Beatles would be a key influence for Ozzy, but bassist Geezer Butler also shaped Ozzy's work, through his lyrics After signing to Vertigo Records in 1970, the four piece used their distinctive sound to full effect for their self-titled debut album, Black Sabbath. Black Sabbath became a commercial success, entering the UK top 10 and the US charts. In it's first year it sold one million copies. Keen to build on the success, the band entered the studio just four months after releasing their debut. The title track, Paranoid, would lead the new album. Featuring archive material, music videos “PARANOID” “EVIL WOMAN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Iron Maiden
programme.desc: With sales near the 90 million mark and a career spanning over four decades, Iron Maiden are giants of the metal scene. The band grew out of London's East End in the early 70s when bassist Steve Harris tried to find the right musicians to suit his ambitious musical ideas. ‘The Number of the Beast' made Iron Maiden global superstars.To date it has sold 14 million copies. Iron Maiden continue to be one of the world's biggest metal acts. Their 2010 release, ‘The Final Frontier' entered at Number one in 28 countries. Featuring archive material, music videos – “RUNNING FREE” “RUN TO THE HILLS” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Beneath the Sea a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world. Captured in exclusively in 8K digital, Beneath the Sea features an award-winning original score by Alan Williams.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Coral Kingdoms was filmed on the kaleidoscopic reefs of Indonesia and the Maldives Islands.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Step into the surreal world of Vanessa Stefanova, a Sydney-based artist blending visual metaphors with spontaneous digital creations. This collection captures her weekly rhythm of painting and digital art—each piece a vivid snapshot of thought, mood, and moment.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Lauren Karp's work blends abstract landscapes with layered images, capturing the earth's rhythm through color, pattern, and light. Her pieces evoke fleeting moments reimagined through movement and emotion.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Discover the cinematic world of Michelangelo Rossi, a self-taught Italian painter whose oil works evoke memory, light, and silence. His layered brushwork and timeless settings invite reflection, capturing quiet moments filled with emotion and depth.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A visual fiesta, radiating the energy of celebration and unity. From intricate depictions of traditional dancers to modern interpretations of iconic symbols, the art encapsulates Mexico's rich history while the music adds to the joyful atmosphere.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A transcendent journey celebrating the vibrancy & diversity of black culture. From evocative photographs to vivid canvases, this collection pays homage to the global tapestry of black identity, uniting voices and visions that resonate with the soul.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Celebrate the dawn of a sparkling New Year with elegant strokes of white, silver, and gold. The artwork create a harmonious symphony of sophistication and hope, radiating a sense of renewal and opulence.

programme.title: ART In Season

programme.title: Color Focus: Holiday Hues of Gold
programme.desc: Adorned in shimmering gold, the artwork radiates warmth and splendor, bringing a touch of luxury to your holiday celebrations, as they gleam with festive cheer and timeless elegance.

programme.title: ART In Season
